data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of targeting past customers for booking offers. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the system is actively targeting past customers. The linked use case mentions the need to send offers to past clients, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this functionality is implemented or tested, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of targeting past customers who might book.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for targeting past customers
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system sends offers to past customers based on their booking history.
